entries.summary: Google's open design system. Material You color scheme with elevation surfaces.

entries.name: IBM Carbon
entries.summary: IBM's open design system. 14px body, zero radius, 8px grid, IBM Plex.

entries.name: Salesforce Lightning
entries.summary: Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS). Trailblazer blue, Salesforce Sans.

entries.name: GOV.UK Design System
entries.summary: UK Government design system. Black on white, accessible green CTA, GDS Transport.

entries.name: Atlassian Design Tokens
entries.summary: Atlassian (Jira/Confluence) design tokens. Indigo blue primary, Charlie typeface.
entries.attribution: © Atlassian Pty Ltd. Atlassian Design System.

entries.name: Tailwind defaults
entries.summary: Tailwind CSS default palette + spacing. Synthesized from public Tailwind docs.
entries.note: Tailwind does not publish DTCG natively; this entry is hand-synthesized from default-theme JS.

entries.name: Bootstrap defaults
entries.summary: Bootstrap 5 default theme. Primary blue, system-ui font, 0.375rem radius.
entries.note: Bootstrap does not publish DTCG natively; this entry is hand-synthesized from _variables.scss.

entries.name: Catppuccin Mocha
entries.summary: The dark Catppuccin flavor. Soothing pastel theme widely used in dev tooling.
